template_data.headline_html: Five places to find federal work before it's posted.

items.title: Sources Sought responses
items.sub: Get your name in the file before the solicitation is written

items.title: SAM.gov NAICS + keyword alerts
items.sub: Tight filters surface niche recompetes; broad sweeps miss them

items.title: Recompete tracking on USAspending
items.sub: Public end dates = warm leads 12–18 months out

items.title: Industry Days attendance
items.sub: Face time with the CO before the RFQ drops — show up

items.title: Incumbent mapping
items.sub: Current holder is your competitor or your teaming target

image_prompt: Infographic checklist layout. Bold headline top: 'FIND WORK BEFORE IT'S POSTED' with magnifying glass icon. Left column: illustrated professional woman in business casual at a desk, viewing a government website on a laptop. Right column: 5 checklist rows with green checkmarks and short 2-3 word labels: 'Sources Sought', 'SAM Alerts', 'Recompete Dates', 'Industry Days', 'Incumbent Map'. Dark navy bottom banner with text: 'PIPELINE STARTS 18 MONTHS OUT'. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
